name: Tea Tree Oil
description: An essential oil extracted from Melaleuca alternifolia leaves. Contains rich concentrations of terpinen-4-ol, which disrupts fungal cell walls and bacteria membranes, making it a highly effective natural antiseptic and topical antifungal.
preparation: Apply 2-3 drops of diluted tea tree oil (5-10% in carrier oil like coconut oil) topically over fungal lesions or insect bites twice daily.
safetyAlert: External topical use only. Strict contraindication for oral ingestion (triggers ataxia and confusion). Inspect skin for contact dermatitis before widespread use.
interactions: None recorded topically. Synergistic antibacterial effects when combined with standard zinc creams.
